\tzpentry{ID4956}{VABdx Quantised Units Trawinistic Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4956 introduces VABdx Quantised Units Trawinistic Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$VA⋅Bd3x is quantised in units of the Trawinistic winding number, i.e., H=w $
\]
